title: Garlic Is as Good as Ten Mothers
original_title: Garlic Is as Good as Ten Mothers
overview: A zesty paean of praise to the greater glories of garlic. This lip-smacking foray into the history, consumption, cultivation and culinary/curative powers of the stinking rose features chef Alice Waters of Chez Panisse, and a flavorful musical soundtrack.  Preserved by the Academy Film Archive in 1999.
